title: Pipe chart truly fits the panel — no cutoff or scrollbar
description:
Pipe chart sizing now uses the float panel’s fixed height (not a content-grown body), reserves space for From/To spheres and chart chrome, and forces overflow hidden. The howto line is hidden in the panel to free vertical space. CSS is cache-busted so browsers pick up the fix.

Who is affected: PipeShare Pipe chart on BASE after deploy; SaaS after Push.
changeLog: Pipe chart fit uses panel height so the shaft shrinks instead of clipping the To end.
Force overflow:hidden on pipe panel containers — no inner scrollbar.
Compact chart chrome in the float panel; hide howto to free space.
Cache-bust file-host.css so the fit styles load.
